items.how_used: 将单区域气候控制问题建模为约束多目标优化问题，目标包括用户舒适度最大化和能耗最小化，决策变量为实际室温。
items.source_excerpt: Overall, the model is a constrained multi-objective optimization problem with two main objectives: 1. achieve the user's desired temperatures, 2. reduce the power consumption of the system.

items.how_used: 使用自相关分析识别用户日程中的周期，以预测用户在不同时刻的理想温度。
items.source_excerpt: the system will use autocorrelation analysis to identify periods in users' schedules.

items.how_used: 通过加权平均历史数据预测用户理想温度，权重基于自相关分析。
items.source_excerpt: The system will then predict the desired temperature based on temperatures set at that time in other periods by taking their weighted average.

items.how_used: 使用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）寻找最优温度曲线，最大化净效用。
items.source_excerpt: We performed Monte-Carlo Tree Search to find the optimal temperature curve that maximizes the net utility of the users.

items.how_used: 使用平均绝对误差（MAE）评估温度预测精度，误差小于1°C。

Assumption: The relationship between a user's satisfaction and the difference between his/her ideal temperature and the actual temperature can be modelled by a normal distribution function.
